result.summary: Found 4 major issues: truncated text in navigation menu and multiple game titles that are cut off or incomplete across the exclusive and new games sections.

issues.description: Navigation menu item 'Hot Gam' is truncated and should read 'Hot Games' or similar - text is cut off at the right edge
issues.suggestion: Adjust the width of the navigation buttons or use responsive design to ensure full text visibility, or implement text truncation with ellipsis (...) if space is limited

issues.description: Game title in exclusive games section showing only 'MAGNI' and 'PHOI' - text is cut off vertically and horizontally
issues.suggestion: Increase the height of game cards or reduce font size to ensure complete game titles are visible within the card boundaries

issues.description: Game title in exclusive games section showing only 'MUNC' and 'MM' - incomplete text rendering
issues.suggestion: Ensure game card dimensions accommodate full title text, or implement text truncation with ellipsis for consistency

issues.description: Game title in top played new games section showing only 'HYPERCR' - text is horizontally truncated
issues.suggestion: Adjust card width or implement responsive layout to display complete game titles, or use text truncation with ellipsis
